title: alchemilla ellenbeckii var. palustris
intro: Alchemilla ellenbeckii var. palustris, also known as marsh lady's mantle, is a variety of the alchemilla plant, a flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of marsh lady's mantle include reducing swelling and pain, soothing digestive issues, and supporting skin health, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of medicinal use.
